# Portfolio.me
Authored By Aashu Singh
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Aashu Baliram Singh — AI, Robotics &amp; Automation</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --navy:#0B1F3A;
    --navy-deep:#071527;
    --panel:#0E2543;
    --blue:#4C8BF5;
    --blue-dim:#2E5490;
    --paper:#F5F7FA;
    --slate:#8FA3BF;
    --amber:#FFB454;
    --green:#5FD3A0;
    --grid-line: rgba(76,139,245,0.10);
  }

  *{box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0;}

  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}

  body{
    background:var(--navy);
    color:var(--paper);
    font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
    line-height:1.6;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(var(--grid-line) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, var(--grid-line) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 32px 32px;
  }

  a{color:inherit;}

  h1,h2,h3{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  }

  .mono{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  }

  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.72rem;
    letter-spacing:0.14em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--amber);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:0.6em;
    margin-bottom:0.9rem;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{
    content:"";
    width:18px;
    height:1px;
    background:var(--amber);
    display:inline-block;
  }

  /* ---- layout shell ---- */
  .wrap{
    max-width:920px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:0 28px;
    position:relative;
  }

  /* ---- circuit spine ---- */
  .spine{
    position:absolute;
    left:0;
    top:0;
    bottom:0;
    width:2px;
    background:linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--blue-dim) 4%, var(--blue-dim) 96%, transparent);
    transform-origin:top;
    transform:scaleY(0);
    transition:transform 1.4s ease;
  }
  .spine.on{transform:scaleY(1);}

  @media(max-width:720px){ .spine{display:none;} }

  /* ---- header / nav ---- */
  header{
    position:sticky;
    top:0;
    z-index:50;
    background:rgba(7,21,39,0.85);
    backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(76,139,245,0.18);
  }
  .nav-inner{
    max-width:920px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:16px 28px;
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:center;
  }
  .brand{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.85rem;
    letter-spacing:0.05em;
    color:var(--paper);
  }
  .brand span{color:var(--amber);}

  .nav-brand-group{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:12px;
  }
  .nav-avatar{
    width:36px;
    height:36px;
    object-fit:cover;
    border:1px solid var(--blue-dim);
    position:relative;
  }
  .nav-avatar-frame{
    position:relative;
    width:36px;
    height:36px;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .nav-avatar-frame::before, .nav-avatar-frame::after,
  .nav-avatar-frame .c2, .nav-avatar-frame .c3{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    width:6px;
    height:6px;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .nav-avatar-frame::before{top:-2px; left:-2px; border-top:2px solid var(--amber); border-left:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .nav-avatar-frame::after{top:-2px; right:-2px; border-top:2px solid var(--amber); border-right:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .nav-avatar-frame .c2{bottom:-2px; left:-2px; border-bottom:2px solid var(--amber); border-left:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .nav-avatar-frame .c3{bottom:-2px; right:-2px; border-bottom:2px solid var(--amber); border-right:2px solid var(--amber);}

  /* hero photo */
  .hero-top{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:36px;
    flex-wrap:wrap-reverse;
  }
  .hero-copy{
    flex:1 1 380px;
    min-width:280px;
  }
  .hero-photo-frame{
    position:relative;
    width:150px;
    height:150px;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .hero-photo-frame img{
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    border:1px solid rgba(76,139,245,0.3);
  }
  .hero-photo-frame::before, .hero-photo-frame::after,
  .hero-photo-frame .c2, .hero-photo-frame .c3{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    width:16px;
    height:16px;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .hero-photo-frame::before{top:-6px; left:-6px; border-top:2px solid var(--amber); border-left:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .hero-photo-frame::after{top:-6px; right:-6px; border-top:2px solid var(--amber); border-right:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .hero-photo-frame .c2{bottom:-6px; left:-6px; border-bottom:2px solid var(--amber); border-left:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .hero-photo-frame .c3{bottom:-6px; right:-6px; border-bottom:2px solid var(--amber); border-right:2px solid var(--amber);}
  @media(max-width:560px){
    .hero-photo-frame{width:110px; height:110px;}
  }
  nav ul{
    list-style:none;
    display:flex;
    gap:28px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.74rem;
    letter-spacing:0.06em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  nav a{text-decoration:none; color:var(--slate); transition:color .2s;}
  nav a:hover, nav a:focus-visible{color:var(--amber);}
  @media(max-width:640px){ nav ul{gap:16px;} nav a{font-size:0.66rem;} }

  /* ---- panel (schematic frame) ---- */
  .panel{
    position:relative;
    padding:64px 0 64px 40px;
    border-top:1px solid rgba(76,139,245,0.14);
  }
  .panel:first-of-type{border-top:none;}
  @media(max-width:720px){ .panel{padding-left:0;} }

  .node{
    position:absolute;
    left:-5px;
    top:66px;
    width:12px;
    height:12px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--navy);
    border:2px solid var(--blue);
  }
  @media(max-width:720px){ .node{display:none;} }

  .ref{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.7rem;
    color:var(--blue);
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
  }

  /* ---- hero ---- */
  .hero{
    padding:120px 0 80px;
    border-top:none;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(2.4rem, 6vw, 4.2rem);
    line-height:1.05;
    margin-bottom:18px;
  }
  .hero h1 .accent{color:var(--blue);}
  .hero .role{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    color:var(--amber);
    font-size:1.05rem;
    margin-bottom:24px;
  }
  .hero p.lede{
    max-width:560px;
    color:var(--slate);
    font-size:1.05rem;
    margin-bottom:32px;
  }
  .hero-actions{
    display:flex;
    gap:16px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .btn{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.8rem;
    letter-spacing:0.04em;
    text-decoration:none;
    padding:12px 22px;
    border-radius:2px;
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
    transition:transform .15s ease, background .2s ease;
  }
  .btn-primary{
    background:var(--blue);
    color:var(--navy-deep);
    font-weight:600;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover, .btn-primary:focus-visible{background:#6a9dfa; transform:translateY(-1px);}
  .btn-ghost{
    border:1px solid var(--blue-dim);
    color:var(--paper);
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover, .btn-ghost:focus-visible{border-color:var(--blue); color:var(--blue);}

  /* corner brackets on hero visual */
  .schematic-tag{
    margin-top:56px;
    border:1px solid rgba(76,139,245,0.3);
    padding:18px 20px;
    position:relative;
    max-width:560px;
  }
  .schematic-tag::before, .schematic-tag::after,
  .schematic-tag .c2, .schematic-tag .c3{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    width:10px;
    height:10px;
    border-color:var(--amber);
  }
  .schematic-tag::before{top:-1px; left:-1px; border-top:2px solid var(--amber); border-left:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .schematic-tag::after{top:-1px; right:-1px; border-top:2px solid var(--amber); border-right:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .schematic-tag .c2{bottom:-1px; left:-1px; border-bottom:2px solid var(--amber); border-left:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .schematic-tag .c3{bottom:-1px; right:-1px; border-bottom:2px solid var(--amber); border-right:2px solid var(--amber);}
  .schematic-tag p{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.8rem;
    color:var(--slate);
    line-height:1.7;
  }
  .schematic-tag p b{color:var(--paper); font-weight:600;}

  /* ---- section titles ---- */
  .sec-title{
    font-size:1.7rem;
    margin-bottom:8px;
  }
  .sec-sub{
    color:var(--slate);
    max-width:560px;
    margin-bottom:36px;
  }

  /* ---- skills ---- */
  .skill-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap:14px;
  }
  @media(max-width:560px){ .skill-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .skill-card{
    border:1px solid rgba(76,139,245,0.18);
    background:var(--panel);
    padding:18px 20px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .skill-card .lvl-label{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.65rem;
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--slate);
    margin-bottom:10px;
    display:block;
  }
  .skill-card h3{
    font-size:1.02rem;
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .bar-track{
    height:5px;
    background:rgba(76,139,245,0.15);
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .bar-fill{
    position:absolute; left:0; top:0; bottom:0;
    background:var(--blue);
    width:var(--pct);
    transform:scaleX(0);
    transform-origin:left;
    transition:transform 1s ease;
  }
  .bar-fill.on{transform:scaleX(1);}
  .bar-note{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.68rem;
    color:var(--slate);
    margin-top:8px;
    display:block;
  }

  /* ---- certifications ---- */
  .cert-list{display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px;}
  .cert-item{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:16px;
    border:1px solid rgba(95,211,160,0.25);
    background:var(--panel);
    padding:18px 20px;
  }
  .cert-icon{
    flex:0 0 auto;
    width:34px; height:34px;
    border:1px solid var(--green);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    color:var(--green);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.7rem;
  }
  .cert-item h3{font-size:1rem; margin-bottom:4px;}
  .cert-item p{color:var(--slate); font-size:0.88rem;}

  /* ---- experience timeline ---- */
  .tl-item{
    padding-bottom:32px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .tl-item:last-child{padding-bottom:0;}
  .tl-head{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:8px;
    margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .tl-head h3{font-size:1.05rem;}
  .tl-date{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.72rem;
    color:var(--blue);
  }
  .tl-org{color:var(--amber); font-size:0.9rem; margin-bottom:8px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;}
  .tl-item p.desc{color:var(--slate); max-width:600px;}

  /* ---- learning / roadmap ---- */
  .road{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:0;
    border-left:1px dashed rgba(76,139,245,0.3);
    margin-left:6px;
  }
  .road-item{
    padding:14px 0 14px 24px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .road-item::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    left:-5px; top:20px;
    width:9px; height:9px;
    background:var(--navy);
    border:2px solid var(--amber);
    border-radius:50%;
  }
  .road-item h3{font-size:0.98rem; margin-bottom:4px;}
  .road-item p{color:var(--slate); font-size:0.88rem;}

  /* ---- education ---- */
  .edu-card{
    border:1px solid rgba(76,139,245,0.18);
    background:var(--panel);
    padding:24px;
  }
  .edu-card h3{font-size:1.1rem; margin-bottom:6px;}
  .edu-card .edu-meta{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.78rem;
    color:var(--blue);
    margin-bottom:12px;
  }
  .edu-card p{color:var(--slate);}
  .fill-me{
    color:var(--amber);
    border-bottom:1px dashed var(--amber);
  }

  /* ---- contact / footer ---- */
  .contact-panel{
    text-align:left;
    padding-bottom:100px;
  }
  .contact-card{
    border:1px solid rgba(76,139,245,0.3);
    background:var(--panel);
    padding:40px;
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:center;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:24px;
  }
  .contact-card h2{font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:8px;}
  .contact-card p{color:var(--slate);}
  .email-link{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:1rem;
    color:var(--amber);
    text-decoration:none;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--amber);
    padding-bottom:2px;
  }

  footer{
    border-top:1px solid rgba(76,139,245,0.15);
    padding:24px 0;
    text-align:center;
    color:var(--slate);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:0.7rem;
  }

  /* reveal-on-scroll */
  .reveal{
    opacity:0;
    transform:translateY(16px);
    transition:opacity .6s ease, transform .6s ease;
  }
  .reveal.on{opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);}

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    *{transition:none !important; scroll-behavior:auto !important;}
    .reveal{opacity:1; transform:none;}
    .spine{transform:scaleY(1);}
    .bar-fill{transform:scaleX(1);}
  }

  :focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--amber); outline-offset:3px;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <div class="nav-brand-group">
      <div class="nav-avatar-frame">
        <span class="c2"></span><span class="c3"></span>
        <img class="nav-avatar" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Aashu Baliram Singh">
      </div>
      <div class="brand">AASHU<span>_</span>BALIRAM<span>_</span>SINGH</div>
    </div>
    <nav>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
        <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
        <li><a href="#certs">Certs</a></li>
        <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
        <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
      </ul>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>

<div class="wrap">
  <div class="spine" id="spine"></div>

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="panel hero" id="about">
    <p class="ref mono">SEC-A / PROFILE</p>
    <div class="hero-top">
      <div class="hero-copy">
        <h1>Aashu Baliram Singh — building toward <span class="accent">AI, Robotics &amp; Automation.</span></h1>
        <p class="role">B.Sc. AIRA Student · Aspiring AI &amp; Automation Engineer</p>
        <p class="lede">B.Sc. AI, Robotics &amp; Automation Student.<br>Passionate about AI, coding, and innovation.<br>Creating today for a smarter tomorrow.</p>
        <div class="hero-actions">
          <a class="btn btn-primary" href="mailto:aashusingh1706@gmail.com">Email me →</a>
          <a class="btn btn-ghost" href="#experience">View background</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-photo-frame">
        <span class="c2"></span><span class="c3"></span>
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Aashu Baliram Singh">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="schematic-tag">
      <span class="c2"></span><span class="c3"></span>
      <p><b>STATUS:</b> Currently pursuing B.Sc. in AI, Robotics &amp; Automation (AIRA)<br>
      <b>FOCUS:</b> Python · C++ · AI fundamentals · Ethical hacking basics<br>
      <b>OPEN TO:</b> Internships, junior/trainee roles, project collaboration</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- SKILLS -->
  <section class="panel reveal" id="skills">
    <div class="node"></div>
    <p class="ref mono">SEC-B / SKILLS</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Technical toolkit</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">What I currently work with, and where I'm actively building depth.</p>
    <div class="skill-grid">

      <div class="skill-card">
        <span class="lvl-label">Language</span>
        <h3>Python</h3>
        <div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="--pct:55%"></div></div>
        <span class="bar-note">Currently learning — core syntax, scripting, early AI/ML exposure</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-card">
        <span class="lvl-label">Language</span>
        <h3>C++</h3>
        <div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="--pct:60%"></div></div>
        <span class="bar-note">Comfortable with fundamentals — syntax, logic, data structures basics</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-card">
        <span class="lvl-label">Language</span>
        <h3>HTML</h3>
        <div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="--pct:65%"></div></div>
        <span class="bar-note">Structuring and building basic web pages</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-card">
        <span class="lvl-label">Domain</span>
        <h3>AI &amp; Robotics Fundamentals</h3>
        <div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="--pct:45%"></div></div>
        <span class="bar-note">Coursework-based — core concepts of AI, robotics &amp; automation</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-card">
        <span class="lvl-label">Domain</span>
        <h3>Ethical Hacking Basics</h3>
        <div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="--pct:45%"></div></div>
        <span class="bar-note">Certified — foundational security concepts</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-card">
        <span class="lvl-label">Soft skill</span>
        <h3>Remote Collaboration</h3>
        <div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="--pct:70%"></div></div>
        <span class="bar-note">Built through fully remote internship work</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CERTIFICATIONS -->
  <section class="panel reveal" id="certs">
    <div class="node"></div>
    <p class="ref mono">SEC-C / CERTIFICATIONS</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Certifications</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Self-directed learning, completed alongside coursework.</p>
    <div class="cert-list">
      <div class="cert-item">
        <div class="cert-icon">01</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Basics of Ethical Hacking</h3>
          <p>Foundational concepts of ethical hacking and cybersecurity practices. Issued by Simplilearn (in collaboration with SkillUp) · 5 July 2026</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert-item">
        <div class="cert-icon">02</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Introduction to AI</h3>
          <p>Core principles of artificial intelligence and its real-world applications. Issued by Simplilearn (in collaboration with SkillUp) · 2 July 2024</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="sec-sub" style="margin-top:20px; margin-bottom:0;">Certificates available on request — view them <a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/19dr2PtUTQM3nnBTtf777eRj5c_fUk4Wb" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:var(--blue); border-bottom:1px solid var(--blue-dim);">via Google Drive</a>.</p>
  </section>

  <!-- EDUCATION -->
  <section class="panel reveal" id="education">
    <div class="node"></div>
    <p class="ref mono">SEC-D / EDUCATION</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Education</h2>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <h3>B.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence, Robotics &amp; Automation (AIRA)</h3>
      <p class="edu-meta">B.K Birla College · Expected graduation: 2029</p>
      <p>Coursework spanning AI fundamentals, robotics principles, and automation systems, paired with independent study in programming and cybersecurity.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- EXPERIENCE -->
  <section class="panel reveal" id="experience">
    <div class="node"></div>
    <p class="ref mono">SEC-E / EXPERIENCE</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Experience</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Remote internships completed via Internshala.</p>

    <div class="tl-item">
      <div class="tl-head">
        <h3>Fundraising Campaign Intern</h3>
        <span class="tl-date">17 July 2024</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-org">She Can Foundation — Internshala Remote Internship</div>
      <p class="desc">Supported virtual fundraising initiatives by engaging with potential donors and promoting campaigns across digital platforms.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="tl-item">
      <div class="tl-head">
        <h3>Fundraising Campaign Intern</h3>
        <span class="tl-date">16 July 2024</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-org">Nayepankh Foundation — Internshala Remote Internship</div>
      <p class="desc">Supported virtual fundraising initiatives by engaging with potential donors and promoting campaigns across digital platforms.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="tl-item">
      <div class="tl-head">
        <h3>Fundraising Campaign Intern</h3>
        <span class="tl-date">25 July 2024</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-org">Taare Zameen Par Foundation — Internshala Remote Internship</div>
      <p class="desc">Supported virtual fundraising initiatives by engaging with potential donors and promoting campaigns across digital platforms.</p>
    </div>

  </section>

  <!-- LEARNING ROADMAP -->
  <section class="panel reveal" id="roadmap">
    <div class="node"></div>
    <p class="ref mono">SEC-F / IN PROGRESS</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Currently building</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">What's next on the path to job-ready.</p>
    <div class="road">
      <div class="road-item">
        <h3>Deepen Python for AI/ML</h3>
        <p>Moving from syntax fluency into applied libraries and small AI projects.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="road-item">
        <h3>First hands-on robotics/automation project</h3>
        <p>Planning a small applied project to pair with coursework — to be added here once built.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="road-item">
        <h3>Portfolio of applied work</h3>
        <p>This section is reserved for real projects as they're completed.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CONTACT -->
  <section class="panel contact-panel reveal" id="contact">
    <div class="node"></div>
    <p class="ref mono">SEC-G / CONTACT</p>
    <div class="contact-card">
      <div>
        <h2>Let's talk.</h2>
        <p>Open to internships, trainee roles, and relevant project work.</p>
      </div>
      <a class="email-link" href="mailto:aashusingh1706@gmail.com">aashusingh1706@gmail.com</a>
    </div>
  </section>

</div>

<footer>
  © <span id="year"></span> AASHU BALIRAM SINGH — BUILT WITH INTENTION.
</footer>

<script>
  document.getElementById('year').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();

  const spine = document.getElementById('spine');
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const bars = document.querySelectorAll('.bar-fill');

  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
    entries.forEach(e=>{
      if(e.isIntersecting){
        e.target.classList.add('on');
      }
    });
  }, {threshold:0.2});

  reveals.forEach(el=>io.observe(el));

  const barIo = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
    entries.forEach(e=>{
      if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('on'); }
    });
  }, {threshold:0.4});
  bars.forEach(b=>barIo.observe(b));

  window.addEventListener('load', ()=>{ spine.classList.add('on'); });
</script>

</body>
</html>
